name: ppt-training-studio
description: PowerPoint skills for training decks, workshops, courses, lessons, job aids, exercises, and learner-centered slide design.

interface.shortDescription: Training, workshop, and learning PowerPoint decks.
interface.longDescription: PPT Training Studio provides skills for learner-centered PowerPoint decks. It uses cognitive-load management, multimedia learning principles, accessibility, practice design, knowledge checks, facilitator notes, visuals, video guidance, and artifact-tool PowerPoint production through the Presentations plugin.
